---
title: "How It Works"
description: "Five-step process from research question to publication-ready analysis: define, scope, quote, analyse and finalise."
pagetitle: "How It Works — StudyStats Process"
format: html
---
<div class="how-it-works">
<div class="hero">

<h1></h1> 
<p>Your path to robust, insightful statistical analysis</p> </div> <div class="container"> <div class="steps"> <div class="step"> 
<h2>1. Define Your Research</h2> <p> 
Kick off by developing your research question. <a href="https://bridaybrummer.github.io/study_stats_site/how_it_works.html"> Learn key concepts </a> for setting objectives and calculating sample sizes. </p> </div> <div class="step"> 
<h2>2. Check Feasibility</h2> 
<p> Use our sample size tools to ensure your research is feasible with your available or collectable data. Book a consultation with Brian if you need guidance. </p> </div> <div class="step"> 
<h2>3. Finalize Protocol & Quote</h2> 
<p> With your protocol ready – including sample size and ethical approval – we offer tailored quotes (R3000-R8000). A 50% deposit secures your project start. </p> </div> <div class="step"> 
<h2>4. Data Analysis & Feedback</h2> 
<p> After receiving your data, we deliver a preliminary analysis within 1-2 weeks. Expect iterative feedback and revisions before finalizing your deliverable. </p> </div> <div class="step" style="flex: 1 1 100%;"> 
<h2>5. Final Touches & Support</h2> 
<p> The final product is designed for easy integration into your manuscript. Need copy editing or further interpretation? Check out our <a href="https://bridaybrummer.github.io/study_stats_site/friends.html"> recommended partners </a> and resources on our blog. </p> </div> </div> <div class="cta"> 
<h2>Ready to Get Started?</h2> <p> Book your 45-minute consultation for just R500 to jump-start your project. </p> <a href="https://bridaybrummer.github.io/study_stats_site/contact.html">Contact Us Now</a> </div> </div>
</div>
